comments.text: I have a formalisation of Theorem 1.1(a) in Przemek's note. I have not formalised 1.1(b) because the proof relies on the result by Erdős which is not available in mathlib and would itself be a substantial formalisation project. The formalisation was done by ChatGPT+Codex largely autonomously. https://github.com/AllenGrahamHart/FormalConjectures-Bench/tree/main/formalizations/erdos1151
Thanks. I have confirmed this is correct. Theorem 1.1(a) is the main part of the contribution.
I will try to formalise this in Lean
For this you can press the 'I am working on formalising the results on this problem' button, so that other people know.
Thanks! I have clicked the button
I've got a pretty elementary solution with GPT-5.5 Pro using explicit “primitive row” decomposition of the Chebyshev-node measures. Here's the note.
Congrats. Standard check found no issues.
